tools.name: afsim_agent_run
tools.description: Run the local AFSIM Agent loop: retrieve knowledge, draft JSON with Ollama, validate, generate AFSIM files, and run mission.exe.

run.description: Whether to run mission.exe after generation.

fallback_rules.description: Whether to allow rule fallback if the local model fails.

tools.name: afsim_agent_status
tools.description: Read the latest Step 07 Agent artifacts and return a compact status summary.
